Ammut.name: Ammut
Ammut.description:
These chimeric, desert-dwelling fiends have massive bodies that are part hippopotamus, part large cat, and part crocodile. Though they devour souls for sustenance, ammuts are infamously picky eaters; most will only eat experienced adventurers or, for a special treat, particularly evil creatures, passing over common folk or those whose mettle has never been tested.

Only a few ammuts are known to exist, and most dwell in Osirion. However, recent expeditions into Orv's Vault of the Black Desert have uncovered the existence of ammuts in this region, as well.

items.name: Нога
items.description: plus @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} @Check[fortitude|dc:38] negates.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description: The ammut exhales a blast of flame that deals @Damage[18d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:37|basic|options:area-effect] save). The ammut can't use their Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]] rounds.

items.name: Пожирание души
items.description: A creature whose HP drops to 0 while swallowed by an ammut has its soul consumed, as well as its body. The creature dies instantly and cannot be brought back to life except by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.YfJTXyVGzLhM6V8U], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu], or similar magic.

items.name: Быстрое проглатывание
items.description:
Триггер: Аммут @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Хватает} существо.

Эффект: Аммут использует "Проглотить целиком".

items.name: Проглотить целиком
items.description:
Большой, @Damage[(3d12+8)[bludgeoning]], Разрыв 32

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

items.name: Wasting Wound
items.description: A creature dealt damage by an ammut's claw Strike must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:37] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failed save). The conditions cannot be mitigated until the curse is removed, and the curse cannot be removed until all damage dealt by the claw Strike is healed. Each day, a creature afflicted with wasting wound must attempt another saving throw; on a failed save, the values of its enfeebled and drained conditions each increase by 1. If the victim dies while cursed, its soul is destroyed, as per the ammut's devour soul ability.

items.name: Chief Constable's Badge
items.description:
When displayed prominently, this brass badge makes creatures find you more agreeable. You gain a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy checks.

Активация: 1 Recall Knowledge

Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: Совершите проверку @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] с КС 20 о народе людского этноса, нечеловеческой родословной, или другого вида существа (Мастер определяет ваши возможные варианты). При успехе, бонус предмета увеличивается до +2 к проверкам Дипломатии с существами этой группы до конца дня.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.pAMyEbJzWBoYoGhs]{Effect: Chief Constable's Badge}

items.name: Shrewd Eye
items.description: Андера считает результаты всех проверок Восприятия, чтобы @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw], на одну степень успеха лучше.

0.text: Андера считает результаты всех проверок Восприятия, чтобы @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw], на одну степень успеха лучше.

items.name: Call to Halt
items.description:
Andera makes an @Check[intimidation] check and compares it to the Will DC of each creature she chooses within 30 feet. Regardless of her result, the targets are temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

Критический успех: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 1 minute and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Успех: The target takes a –10-foot penalty to all its Speeds for 1 minute and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.pvA97TXnq7wCbXp6]

Angry Vegetation.name: Angry Vegetation
Angry Vegetation.descriptionHazard: Five large flowers in the weed-choked field unfurl, each dusting pollen onto vines that animate into @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core-2.Actor.jW55DX3sJU2uTNrM]{Wemmuths}.
Angry Vegetation.disable: @Check[nature|dc:48|name:Calm a Flower|traits:environmental] (master) or @Check[performance|dc:48|name:Calm a Flower|traits:environmental] (legendary) to calm a flower, closing it
Angry Vegetation.reset: Wemmuths collapse into ordinary vines and the trap resets if the area is left alone for 1 minute.
Angry Vegetation.routine:
(2 actions) If there are fewer wemmuths than open flowers, the flowers create more wemmuths (so there as many wemmuths as open flowers) as their first action.

For their second action, the flowers produce a mindaddling pollen. Each non-plant creature within 30 feet of a flower must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:41|name:Mindaddling Pollen|traits:emotion,mental,olfactory] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round, on a critical failure). The pollen is an emotion, mental, and olfactory effect.
Angry Vegetation.stealth: @Check[perception|dc:42|traits:action:seek] (master) to notice massive buds beneath the other foliage before they open

items.name: Цветение
items.description:
Триггер: A non-plant creature enters the garden

Эффект: The blooms open, spawning a single @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core-2.Actor.jW55DX3sJU2uTNrM] that acts on the hazard's initiative, and the hazard rolls for initiative.

Ararda.name: Ararda
Ararda.description:
Before the Black Desert became a barren sandscape, cultures with grand magical traditions lived under its soaring roof. These communities eventually left the vault or died out, but the genies they summoned remained and became warped by the region's pervasive blightburn radiation. Now, these "blightburn genies" have bodies with features mirroring those of beasts that dwell in dark places, and their elemental lineages have been irreparably corrupted.

Shaitans corrupted by the Black Desert's blightburn become scorpion-like arardas. While other earth genies sparkle with the iridescence of gemstones and evoke the power of the earth itself, arardas use their connection to the ground to harness the might of electricity. Arardas are so infused with this radioactive crystal that their mere presence is toxic to most living creatures.

items.name: Blightburn Radiation
items.description:
60 feet. Blightburn crystals infused into an ararda's body attempt to counteract any teleportation spell moving into or out of the aura's emanation (counteract check +31; 7th level).

In addition, any creature that starts its turn within the emanation is exposed to Blightburn Sickness. The aura is blocked by lead sheeting, 1 foot of stone, or large force effects (such as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo], but not a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TVKNbcgTee19PXZR] spell).

An ararda can suppress their aura with an action (1) that has the concentrate trait.

items.name: Charged Earth
items.description: Any creature that hits an ararda with an unarmed attack or touches the ararda takes @Damage[2d8[electricity]] damage. Weapons that hit an ararda also take @Damage[2d8[electricity]] damage.

items.name: Болезнь гнилостного ожога
items.description:
Creatures native to the Black Desert are immune, as are creatures who are affected by blightburn sickness but recover from it. The target can't recover from the disease's drained or sickened condition except by magic.

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Возникновение: [[/gmr 1d4 #дни]]{1d4 дня}

Стадия 1: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 1} (1 день)

Стадия 2: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 1} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошнота 1} (1 день)

Стадия 3: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 2} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошнота 2} (1 неделя)

Стадия 4: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 3} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошнота 3} (1 месяц)

Стадия 5: increase @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR] condition by 1 (1 year)

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description:
The ararda can take on the form of a scorpion. The scorpion form always looks the same, but the ararda can choose to become either Tiny or Small in this form. This transformation doesn't change their Speed or the attack and damage bonuses of their Strikes, but might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to piercing).

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

items.name: Земляное скольжение
items.description: Аранда может @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.H6v1VgowHaKHnVlG]{Рыть} через грязь и камень с полной Скоростью рытья, не оставляя туннелей или признаков прохода.

Axiomatic Polymorph Trap.name: Axiomatic Polymorph Trap
Axiomatic Polymorph Trap.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:48|name:Drain the Glyph's Power|traits:magical,trap] (master) to drain the glyph's power harmlessly, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (9th level; counteract DC 42) to counteract the glyph
Axiomatic Polymorph Trap.Hdescription: A Utopian glyph transforms trespassers into aeons.

Bogey.name: Bogey
Bogey.description:
A bogey typically hunts a single creature at a time, usually a small child or elderly person, methodically stalking and tormenting their prey. Often hiding under a bed, amid a dark attic space, or in a closet left slightly ajar, the bogey delights in the slow, methodical cultivation of fear in its victims.

Bogeymen are stealers of innocence and devourers of souls. Few targets who survive an encounter with them remain unchanged. Different names are given to bogeymen according to their varying sizes and degrees of power, which typically advance as the monsters consume more souls.

Bogeyman.name: Bogeyman
Bogeyman.description:
These nocturnal stalkers tail their chosen quarry for days, even weeks at a time, ominously showing up in back alleys, shadowy street corners, and even in victims' own homes before going in for the kill. For unfathomable reasons, a bogeyman may spare a victim's life and instead kidnap them, absconding to a far-off location before returning years later with a fresh bogey in tow.

Bogeymen are stealers of innocence and devourers of souls. Few targets who survive an encounter with them remain unchanged. Different names are given to bogeymen according to their varying sizes and degrees of power, which typically advance as the monsters consume more souls.

Bone Croupier.name: Bone Croupier
Bone Croupier.description:
For many, gambling is just fun and games, but for some, it can become a bad habit or even a life-consuming addiction. Bone croupiers take the meaning of "life-consuming" to its literal extreme. Undead gamblers whose lust for cards and dice couldn't be sated in life, they haunt the shadowy corners of gambling halls and continue their search for that next hit of adrenaline.

In undeath, gaming takes on a different flavor; with nothing left to lose, bone croupiers turn their attentions toward others, cajoling and palavering normally casual gamers into committing themselves to ever higher stakes. Before they know it, these unsuspecting victims have called in decades-old favors and put liens on their homes in the hope of winning back just a fraction of the pot. But by then the bone croupier has already claimed its prize-for to this undead chiseler, any earnings are incidental, and the real prize is encouraging others to lose their own.

Bone croupiers often enshroud themselves in thick layers of cigar smoke or voluminous robes to mask their undead nature, but they almost always wear wicked grins at the table. This smile is no ruse or part of its poker face, however-the truth is that bone croupiers truly delight in games, regardless of whether they are winning or losing, and despite their incredible skills of deception and trickery, most simply can't disguise their unbridled mirth.

Brughadatch.name: Brughadatch
Brughadatch.description:
The biggest difference between a gahlepod and a grown brughadatch isn't their humanoid appearance, but the powerful magic they gain as they mature.

Brughadatches are malevolent fey tricksters with distinct stages of life: they spawn from the First World's primal energies as esurient tadpoles, grow into humanoids capable of creating enticing illusions, then finally evolve into huge, slothful toads that warp their environs with mere thoughts.

Bugaboo.name: Bugaboo
Bugaboo.description:
After devouring enough souls, a bogey transforms into the more powerful and sophisticated bugaboo.

Bogeymen are stealers of innocence and devourers of souls. Few targets who survive an encounter with them remain unchanged. Different names are given to bogeymen according to their varying sizes and degrees of power, which typically advance as the monsters consume more souls.

Bugul Noz.name: Bugul Noz
Bugul Noz.description:
This gangly fey humanoid wanders the overgrown paths of dark, misty forests, voluntarily isolating themself in an attempt to protect others from their hideous form. A bugul noz's appearance is not merely unsightly-to view the being's form is said to tempt death, and backwoods villagers tell tales of wanderers found struck dead after merely glancing at the creature.

As they jaunt through the forest, the bugul noz sings an eerie tune to alert others to their presence and deter these creatures from looking upon them. The bugul noz does not, after all, want to harm anyone; they are inherently kind, if unpredictable, and if they accidentally kill a creature out of panic or confusion, they grieve. A bugul noz who roams the same road long enough compiles a long list of such accidental victims, and they might carry the corpses off to a single mass grave deep in the forest. When not wandering, the bugul noz watches over this grave to ensure that the spirits of their victims are never lonely.

items.name: Устрашающее присутствие
items.description:
60 футов. Спасбросок @Check[will|dc:29|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened]{Воли}

@Trait[Animal]{Животные} получают штраф обстоятельства −2 к этому спасброску Воли.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

items.name: Horrid Visage
items.description: Creatures that see the bugul noz must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:31] saving throw. On a failure, creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 2} on a critical failure).

items.name: Mirror Vulnerability
items.description: Upon seeing its own reflection in a mirror or other reflective surface, the bugul noz must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:34] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] for [[/r {1d4-1,1} kh #Rounds]]{1d4-1 rounds} (minimum 1 round). While confused and immobilized, the bugul noz cries and wallows in misery, making it immune to visual and auditory effects for the duration.

items.name: Цеп
items.description: The bugul noz swings its limbs about wildly. It makes up to three claw Strikes, each against a different creature and each with a -2 circumstance penalty. Its multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes all the attacks.

items.name: Forest Jaunt
items.description: The bugul noz ignores difficult terrain in forests.

items.name: Haunting Wail
items.description:
The bugul noz lets out a hair-raising keen. Other creatures within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:31|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save.

The bugul noz can't use this ability again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Haunting Wail]]{1d4 rounds}.

Критический успех: Цель невредима.

Успех: The target takes @Damage[2d10[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage.

Провал: The target takes @Damage[4d10[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage and gains sonic weakness 10 for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.EoSs09JUy4Maq296]

Критический провал: As failure, and the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D] for 1 round.

Buzzing Latch Rune.name: Buzzing Latch Rune
Buzzing Latch Rune.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:34|name:Disrupt the Rune|traits:action:disable-a-device] (master) to disrupt the rune without triggering it or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (6th level; counteract DC 31) to magically counteract the rune
Buzzing Latch Rune.Hdescription: An invisible rune on the door begins emitting a very loud buzzing sound, potentially paralyzing an intruder.

Cat Sith.name: Cat Sith
Cat Sith.description:
Cat siths can easily pass for common black house cats, noteworthy only for the white spots on their chests and their unusually bristly personalities. In actuality, they are cunning fey, fully capable of speech, trickery, and even walking upright on their hind legs and using their forepaws almost as skillfully as hands. Cat siths live around highland towns and cities, regularly venturing unnoticed into nearby communities by posing as domesticated felines or using magic to take humanoid form. While some cat siths gather information and undertake tasks for more powerful fey creatures, others serve only their own mysterious agendas.

Cat siths are harbingers of misfortune and find amusement in the unluckiness that follows in their wake. Though they are rarely malicious, they are fascinated by death in all its forms, and may go so far as to steal the souls of the dying for some inscrutable purpose.

items.name: Дурная примета
items.description:
60 feet. Any creature within the area that can see the cat sith must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:21] save or become struck by an ill omen. On a failure, the creature becomes immune to fortune effects as long as it remains in the aura and for 1 minute thereafter. On a critical failure, the creature takes a -1 penalty to attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws while within the ill omen aura and becomes immune to fortune effects for 1 day.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.zXzXDlh0HkyPJu8f]

items.name: Cat Sith's Mark
items.description:
A creature hit by a cat sith's claw must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:23] save or be cursed with misfortune. Whenever the cursed creature rolls a critical success on a skill check or saving throw, it gets a success instead. Each day, a cursed creature can attempt a @Check[flat|dc:10|name:Break Cat Sith's Mark] check to break the curse.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.zTrZozbWDd1A5L5S]

items.name: Украсть душу
items.description: The cat sith touches a dying creature or a creature that died within the past 3 days. If the target is a dying creature, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save; on a failure, its dying value increases by 1 (or 2 on a critical failure). If the target is dead, it receives no save and its soul is imprisoned in the cat sith's body, becoming freed only if the cat sith is slain. While the soul is imprisoned, the creature can't be brought back to life by any means short of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.YfJTXyVGzLhM6V8U]. The cat sith can hold only one soul at a time and can release a soul as a free action.

Catacomb Cave-In.name: Catacomb Cave-In
Catacomb Cave-In.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:21|name:Prop Up Ceiling] (trained) to prop up the ceiling in key locations prior to the cave-in.
Catacomb Cave-In.Hdescription: The ceiling is unstable, and any Medium or larger creature that approaches within 5 feet of the collapsed tunnel triggers a cave-in.

Caustic Dart Trap.name: Caustic Dart Trap
Caustic Dart Trap.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:32|name:Jam the tube|traits:trap,mechanical,complex] (master) to sufficiently jam the tubes to make the trap unable to attack creatures in a single 5-foot square in the room, or @Check[crafting|dc:34|name:Alter a launching mechanism|traits:trap,mechanical,complex] (master) to alter one of the three launching mechanisms.
Caustic Dart Trap.reset: The trap deactivates and resets 1 minute after no creatures are in area C7
Caustic Dart Trap.routine: (3 actions) The trap uses each action for a caustic dart Strike. The trap loses 1 action for each launching mechanism that is broken or destroyed.
Caustic Dart Trap.stealth: (expert) or @Check[perception|dc:30|traits:action:seek] (expert) to notice the three launching mechanisms built into the wall
Caustic Dart Trap.Hdescription: Three launching mechanisms built into the mudbrick walls expel darts containing acidic chemicals. All three launching mechanisms must be disabled or destroyed to deactivate the trap.

items.name: Вонь
items.description:
30 футов.

Существо, попадающее в эту область, должно совершить спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:22|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened]{Стойкости}. При провале оно испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 1}, а при критическом провале оно ещё получает штраф состояния −5 футов к своим Скоростям на 1 раунд. Находясь в этой ауре, существо получает штраф обстоятельства −2 к спасброскам для восстановления от этого состояния @Condition[Sickened]{тошноты}. При успехе существо становится временно иммунно к вони всех @Trait[Xulgath]{зулгатов} на 1 минуту.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.uB3CVn3momZO9h0L]

items.name: Сокрушающая энергия
items.description: Cavnakash expends a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wdA52JJnsuQWeyqz] spell and attempts a melee Strike. If he hits, he adds the spell's void damage to his Strike damage. If he misses, the harm spell is still expended.

items.name: Осквернённый дар
items.description: Cavnakash has a profane gift from Balenni, giving him a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws (already factored into his statistics).

Chimpanzee Visitant.name: Замогильная шимпанзе
Chimpanzee Visitant.description:
Обычные цирковые животные, на которых смотрители смотрят как на расходный материал, возможно, с большей вероятностью станут замогильными. Животные, которые массово погибают, например, при пожаре в палатке или других стихийных бедствиях, могут даже образовывать стаи бродячих мертвецов.

Хотя дикие существа, которых можно увидеть в передвижных цирках, могут развлекать и удивлять, жизнь таких животных иногда печальна и жестока. Владельцы цирков, плохо обращающиеся со своими животными из—за жесткой дисциплины или перетренированности, не видят ничего плохого в своей безжалостности и даже заходят так далеко, что убивают своих артистов — якобы “случайно” - из-за пренебрежения или жестокого обращения. Жертвы такой жестокости, не способные перейти в загробную жизнь — либо потому, что они каким—то образом пропитываются энергией пустоты, либо потому, что их души не могут успокоиться, не отомстив сначала своим обидчикам, - иногда восстают из мертвых в качестве замогильных.

Эти монстры-@Trait[Undead]{нежить} бродят по местам своей гибели и ищут хозяев, превративших их жизнь в ад, преследуя только одну цель: отомстить. Когда они не могут найти своего конкретного обидчика или если они все еще не могут успокоиться даже после столкновения со своим агрессором, замогильные ищут таких же злостных обидчиков животных, становясь мучителями мучителей. Однако замогильные по большей части не способны различать отдельных представителей родословной; таким образом, если дрессировщик-человек подвергал замогильного при жизни жестокому обращению, любой человек, который встретится ему на пути, может стать мишенью гнева замогильного.

Замогильный напоминает зомбированное животное, но в нем сохраняется искра животного разума, которая была у него при жизни, что делает его еще более опасным. Тела замогильных искажены ужасами их жестокого существования: их рты искривлены в постоянном рычании, с потрескавшихся, гнилых губ капает черная слизь. Шрамы от ударов плетью, полученные в результате многочасовых “тренировок”, светятся неестественным фиолетовым светом. И, возможно, прежде всего, их глаза указывают на то, что их коснулась нежить — они запали ужасно глубоко в череп, истекают кровью или другой жидкостью и светятся аурой ужаса и ощутимого гнева.

items.name: Мстительное присутствие
items.description:
20 футов.

Существо начинающее свой ход в ауре замогильного должно преуспеть в спасброске @Check[will|dc:16]{Воли} или будет охвачено жаждой мести.

В течение [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 раундов} (1 минуте при критическом провале), если затронутое существо было атаковано в течение последнего раунда (независимо от того, попала атака в цель или нет), существо должно использовать 1 действие за раунд, чтобы нанести "Удар" или применить враждебное действие по отношению к последнему атакующему, пока тот еще жив. Невыполнение этого требования наносит затронутому существу @Damage[1d6[mental]].

Ciza.name: Ciza
Ciza.description:
Banshees are the furious, tormented souls of elves bound to the Material Plane by a betrayal that defined the final hours of their lives. Some banshees arise from elves who were slain by trusted friends and allies, or whose loved ones betrayed them on their deathbeds. Others spawn from elves whose treacherous deeds shortly before their deaths left a stain upon their souls. Regardless of their origin, banshees despise the living. This hatred of life is all too often a horrific inversion of their personalities in life. Some speculate that the more kind-hearted the elf (and the more wrenching the betrayal), the crueler the banshee.

Banshees rarely stray far from where they perished and typically haunt thick forests and canopied swamps where little light graces the ground. Many banshees can be found in the elven nation of Kyonin, specifically in Tanglebriar, the sinister domain of the demon Treerazer. Similarly, a large number of banshees can be found lurking about the edges of drow settlements in the Darklands, as plenty of cruelty and betrayal exists in drow culture.

Banshees' mere touch inflicts pain and primal fear, and those exposed to their wails of grief rarely survive the experience.

Convergence Lattice.name: Convergence Lattice
Convergence Lattice.disable:
@Check[thievery|dc:40|name:Obliterate a Key Rune|traits:magical,trap] (master) or @Check[religion|dc:35|name:Obliterate a Key Rune|traits:magical,trap] (master) four times to obliterate each of the four key runes.

A @Check[thievery|dc:45|name:Stop the Clockwork's Movement|traits:magical,trap] (legendary) check (or breaking the lattice) stops the clockwork's movement and prevents it from resetting, but doesn't stop its current activation.
Convergence Lattice.reset: The convergence lattice deactivates and resets after there are no uncontrolled targets within line of sight for 1 minute.
Convergence Lattice.routine:
(3 actions) The convergence lattice uses its first action to call for aid. Each convergent creature within 100 feet of the lattice Strides toward the lattice as a reaction. Creatures thus called continue to move toward the lattice on their turn each round until they are adjacent to it, at which point they defend it with their lives.

The lattice uses its second action to deal @Damage[16d6[mental]] (@Check[will|dc:42|basic]) to a non-convergent creature within 100 feet. This damage is nonlethal; a creature knocked out by this damage doesn't gain the dying condition and is automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} by the convergence lattice when they awaken.

The lattice uses its third action to make the same attack against a second non-convergent creature within 100 feet; if there isn't such a second creature, it doesn't take its third action.
Convergence Lattice.stealth: (master) to realize the lattice is a complex clockwork before it begins to move; noticing the lattice itself is DC 0.
Convergence Lattice.Hdescription: A complex clockwork of bright metal and delicately carved gemstones, the lattice's interlocking gears begin to whir as golden runes glow across its surface.

Counteflora.name: Counteflora
Counteflora.description:
The counteflora resembles an oversized dandelion with black flowers and sinister patterns on its bracts, which it can contract for additional protection and to turn its flower head into a deadly bashing weapon. Unlike dandelions, countefloras do not have separate flowering and seeding stages, and can release their intoxicating seedpods as long as their bracts are open.

Countefloras exhibit a strange intellect and communicate with one another by releasing invisible pheromones into the air. Alone, a desperate counteflora may ally with another creature if it is offered water or fertile soil. Contrary to popular belief, countefloras absorb sunlight for sustenance; they do not attack other creatures to feast upon them. Rather, the reason countefloras go to such lengths to kill their opponents is to fertilize the surrounding soil and create a nutrient-rich environment for their seedpods.

items.name: Frost Susceptibility
items.description: Whenever the counteflora takes cold damage, it takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to Speed for 1 round.

items.name: Tighten Bracts
items.description: The counteflora stiffens the specialized leaves around its flower head, protecting its sensitive seedpods. While its bracts are tightened, a counteflora gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and can use its head Strike and Furious Swing abilities, but it cannot use its Black Seed Cloud ability and it loses its sense of sight (so it must rely on its imprecise tremorsense when targeting other creatures). The counteflora can't use its head Strike of Furious Swing ability unless its bracts are tightened. The counteflora can loosen its bracts as a free action. Against plants and fungi, the seeds burrow into the creatures' flesh rather than infiltrate their lungs.

items.name: Black Seed Cloud
items.description:
Требования: the Counteflora's bracts are not tightened.

The counteflora releases a cloud of black seedpods in a @Template[emanation|distance:15]{15-foot-radius emanation}. Non-counteflora creatures in the area must succeed at a Fortitude save or breathe in the toxic seeds. (Against plants and fungi, the seeds burrow into the creatures' flesh rather than infiltrate their lungs.)

Cu Sith.name: Cu Sith
Cu Sith.description:
Cu siths are hound-like doorkeepers of remote portals to other planes, particularly portals to the untamed realm of the fey, the First World. They are highly territorial and roam the highland moors they call home, constantly on the hunt for any creatures that might intrude on their territory. Those that bargain for safe passage to or from a portal find cu siths to be vigilant escorts that keep travelers safe from extraplanar threats but also ensure their charges don't veer from the most direct path to their destination. Cu siths are highly proficient hunters, and to mortals they offer a single warning in the form of their terrifying bark. Creatures that refuse to flee upon hearing a cu sith's warning bark risk a quick and brutal death.

Cu siths cut imposing figures; they are as large as bulls and covered in intertwining roots, plant matter, and shaggy green and white fur that terminates in a long, plaited tail. Their eyes glow with a fiery green light.
Cu Sith.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: +2 Circumstance to All Saves vs. Disarm
Команда животному
items.description:
You issue an order to an animal. Attempt a @Check[nature|defense:will] check against the animal's Will DC. The GM might adjust the DC if the animal has a good attitude toward you, you suggest a course of action it was predisposed toward, or you offer it a treat.

You automatically fail if the animal is hostile or unfriendly to you. If the animal is helpful to you, increase your degree of success by one step. You might be able to Command an Animal more easily with a feat like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Rq5wkA8DtsmbzoGV].

Most animals know the Drop Prone, Leap, Seek, Stand, Stride, and Strike basic actions. If an animal knows an activity, such as a horse's Gallop, you can Command the Animal to perform the activity, but you must spend as many actions on Command an Animal as the activity's number of actions. You can also spend multiple actions to Command the Animal to perform that number of basic actions on its next turn; for instance, you could spend 3 actions to Command an Animal to Stride three times or to Stride twice and then Strike.

Успех: Животное исполняет ваши команды в свой следующий ход.

Провал: Животное колеблется или сопротивляется, не делая ничего.

Критический провал: Животное не слушается или неправильно понимает команду, совершая какое-то другое действие на усмотрение Мастера.

Darklands Alchemical Golem.name: Darklands Alchemical Golem
Darklands Alchemical Golem.description:
Этот голем — ходячий алхимический кошмар, способный причинять всевозможные болезненные раны. Его способность выполнять приказы обеспечивается бездумным гуманоидным мозгом, который плавает в его куполообразной голове. В исключительно редких случаях мозг, использованный при его создании, может сохранять фрагменты воспоминаний или даже настоящий интеллект, в результате чего получается алхимический голем со своей индивидуальностью и целями.

Созданный из базовых материалов и магически оживленный в мощного стража, легендарный голем это живой конструкт, который безвольно подчиняется приказам своего создателя и часто продолжает выполнять их в течение многих лет или даже столетий после смерти своего создателя. Существует 2 известных метода оживления голема. Традиционный метод включает в себя заполучение и имплантацию стихийной души или сущности в только что созданную статую-носитель, и теми кто ценит святость души, эта процедура считается омерзительной и кощунственной; как правило, этот метод предпочитают злые или аморальные создатели големов. Другая, менее постыдная техника предполагает вливание в статую чистой позитивной энергии, чтобы искусственно имитировать создание души. Этот результат не дает голему настоящей души и, как правило, является более дорогостоящим и времязатратным методом создания. Независимо от используемого метода, полученный голем функционирует одинаково. Уникальная оживляющая сила голема делает его восприимчивым к некоторым видам магии, но, за исключением этих нескольких слабостей, он непроницаем для магии и его трудно повредить оружием.

В игре, големы лучше всего работают в качестве врагов, которых нужно победить, а не как союзники, сопровождающие персонажей в приключениях. Процесс создания голема трудоемкий, дорогостоящий и сложный, и только самые талантливые заклинатели или ремесленники могут даже надеяться осуществить такое начинание. Хотя некоторые магические тексты — так называемые "руководства по созданию големов", гласят, что они помогают создателям големов, но по большей части создание голема должно быть делом рук Мастера.

У големов есть части, которые можно добыть в качестве трофеев или магических компонентов; их ценность зависит от конкретного голема. Примеры компонентов, которые можно собрать с големов, перечислены в боковых сносках.

Deghuun (Child of Mhar).name: Deghuun (Child of Mhar)
Deghuun (Child of Mhar).description: Mhar, an ancient evil deity of caverns, mountains, and volcanoes, belongs to the pantheon of the Great Old Ones-monstrous beings of alien intellect and unfathomable power. The so-called children of Mhar (known as deghuuns in the chaotic tongues of Mhar's enraptured cultists) physically resemble blue-gray octopods made of stone, mud, and molten iron. Venthole-like craters dot the surface of a deghuun's body, through which the creature can gaze out with a single golden eye that it can move from crater to crater.

Doblagub.name: Doblagub
Doblagub.description:
Elder brughadatches command groups of fellow brughadatches, who placate the doblagub with fresh meals and trophies of the group's grisly catches.

Brughadatches are malevolent fey tricksters with distinct stages of life: they spawn from the First World's primal energies as esurient tadpoles, grow into humanoids capable of creating enticing illusions, then finally evolve into huge, slothful toads that warp their environs with mere thoughts.

Эффект: The drunken brawler begins raging. They gain 4 temporary Hit Points and deal 1 additional damage with fist Strikes. They have a -1 penalty to AC and can't use actions with the concentrate trait unless those actions also have the rage trait. The drunken brawler can still @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ] while in a drunken rage. The rage lasts for 1 minute or until the drunken brawler falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf], whichever comes first. When the drunken rage is over, the drunken brawler is fatigued, loses all temporary Hit Points they received from the rage, and cannot rage again for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.z3uyCMBddrPK5umr]

items.name: Improvised Surprise
items.description: The drunken brawler uses an Interact action to pick up an improvised weapon within reach and then Strikes with it. The drunken brawler has a +2 circumstance bonus to this attack.

Dyzallin Shraen.name: Dyzallin Shraen
Dyzallin Shraen.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magical effects and positive effects, +2 status to all saves vs. mental effects

items.name: Палочка бури осколков [Заклинание 7-го ранга]
items.description:
Эта палочка имеет резную голову дракона на вершине и полированную металлическую сферу посередине.

Активация: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]

Частота: Раз в день, плюс перегрузка

Эффект: Вы сотворяете @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM] 7-го ранга.

После сотворения заклинания, в начале каждого вашего хода из палочки выпускается дополнительный осколок или осколки, как если бы вы сотворяли версию шквала силы в 1 действие. Каждый раз выбирайте цели. Это длится в течение 1 минуты, пока вы больше не владеете палочкой или пока снова не попытаетесь активировать палочку.

Требования для создания: Предоставить одно сотворение @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM] соответствующего ранга.

items.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magical Effects and Vitality Effects
+2 Status to All Saves vs. Mental Effects
Реагирующий удар (особый)
items.description:
Dyzallin can use Attack of Opportunity when a creature within his reach uses a concentrate action, in addition to the usual trigger. He can disrupt triggering concentrate actions, and he disrupts actions with a successful attack roll, not just a critical success.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

items.name: Mirror Rejuvenation
items.description:
When Dyzallin is destroyed, necromantic energies rebuild his body inside the mirror in his laboratory over the next [[/gmr 1d10 #days]]{1d10 days}.

His re-forming body is visible in the mirror, but the mirror can't be destroyed while he is re-forming unless a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dbd5W6G8U2vzWolN] ritual is first cast upon it. Once Dyzallin's rejuvenation is complete, he steps out of the mirror.

items.name: Utter Despair
items.description:
30 feet. Living creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} while in Dyzallin's utter despair aura. They can't naturally recover from this fear while in the area but lose the frightened condition immediately upon leaving the area.

When a creature first enters the aura, it must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:39|traits:incapacitation] save (after taking the penalty from being frightened) or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

The creature is then temporarily immune to the paralysis caused by the utter despair aura for 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.ob00D61F0c4PIvj1]

items.name: Направленное гниение
items.description: Dyzallin can deliver insidious mummy rot through any weapons he wields.

items.name: Фамильяр
items.description: Dyzallin has an undead raven named Grimbeak as a familiar. Grimbeak can fly, has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.TTCw5NusiSSkJU1x], shares all of Dyzallin's immunities, and grants him an additional 7th-rank spell slot (already incorporated into the stat block).

items.name: Коварное гниение мумии
items.description:
This disease and damage from it can't be healed until the curse is removed.

A creature killed by this curse turns to sand and can't be resurrected except by a 9th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO] ritual or similar magic

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:39]

Стадия 1: переносчик не имеет эффектов недуга (1 минута)

Стадия 2: @Damage[15d6[void]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 day)

Dyzallin's Golem.name: Dyzallin's Golem
Dyzallin's Golem.description: Изготовленные из почти неразрушимого металла большой редкости, адамантиновые големы могут быть уничтожены только самыми сильными противниками. Для изготовления адамантинового голема требуется такое огромное количество адамантина, что для его сбора обычно требуется снарядить экспедицию на далекую планету, План Земли или Внешний План.

items.name: Компактный
items.description: The adamantine golem has been built to resemble a bulky drow elf in full plate armor. It is Large in size and its fist Strike has a reach of 10 feet.

items.name: Антимагия голема
items.description:
Повреждается от @Trait[Acid]{кислоты} (@Damage[9d10[untyped]], @Damage[2d10[untyped]] от областей или продолжительного урона); исцеляется от @Trait[Fire]{огня} (область @Damage[2d10[healing]]); замедляется от @Trait[Electricity]{электричества}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.GolemAntimagic]

items.name: Режим ремонта
items.description:
Когда у адамантинового голема 0 ОЗ, то он не уничтожен. Вместо этого, он входит в режим ремонта, во время которого он @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлен 1}, не может применять реакции и может выполнять только действие "Саморемонт".

Как только у него становится более 30 ОЗ, он может использовать любые виды действия и реакции, однако остаётся @Condition[Slowed]{замедлен 1} и до начала своего следующего хода не может использовать реакции.

Если критическое попадание @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6xaxxKfvXED6LfIY]{Стрижающим} адамантиновым оружием снижает ОЗ голема до 0, или если такое оружие попадает по нему, когда у него уже 0 ОЗ, то голем уничтожается.

items.name: Уязвим к рассеиванию магии
items.description:
Голем может быть целью @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ihbRf964JDXztcy3]{Магического размыкания} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Рассеять магию}.

Если он является целью такого заклинания 9-го ранга или выше, то на [[/gmr 1d4 #раунды]]{1d4 раунда} у голема сопротивление физическому урону снижается до 15 и он @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлен 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлен 2} в режиме ремонта). Если в это время, когда он уже находится в режиме ремонта, ОЗ голема снижаются до 0, то он уничтожен.

items.name: Разрушающий удар
items.description: При критическом попадании "Удар" кулаком адамантинового голема, помимо нанесения цели урона, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Ломает} доспех цели, если он есть. Если у цели поднят щит, то вместо этого голем @Condition[Broken]{ломает} щит.

items.name: Неумолимое шествие
items.description:
Адамантиновый голем @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Перемещается} вплоть до своей Скорости, отталкивая каждое существо через чье пространство он двигается и нанося им урон, если они пытаются остановить его передвижение. Существо может попытаться преградить путь, преуспев в спасброске @Check[fortitude|dc:45|traits:damaging-effect]{Стойкости}.

Критический успех: Существо не получает урона и его доспех не получает урона.

Успех: Голем прекращает свое передвижение и не может войти в квадрат существа.

Провал: Сопротивляющееся существо и его доспех получают урон как от попадания кулаком адамантинового голема.

items.name: Саморемонт
items.description: Голем чинит себя, восстанавливая @Damage[30[healing]].

items.name: Продувка
items.description:
Голем выдувает из своего горна @Template[cone|distance:30]{30-футовый конус} перегретого пара. Это наносит всем существам в конусе @Damage[15d6[fire]|options:area-damage] (простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect]{Рефлекса}).

Голем не может снова использовать "Продувку" [[/gmr 1d6 #Перезарядка продувки]]{1d6 раундов}.

Echoes of Faith.name: Echoes of Faith
Echoes of Faith.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:26|name:Exorcise the spirits|traits:haunt,hazard] (expert) to exorcise the spirits, or @Check[deception|dc:28|name:Imitate the Arodenite faith|traits:haunt,hazard] or @Check[religion|dc:28] (trained) to imitate the Arodenite faith and render the haunt harmless until it resets
Echoes of Faith.reset: The spirits return in [[/gmr 1d8 #Hours]]{1d8 hours} as long as any xulgaths remain in Moonstone Hall.
Echoes of Faith.Hdescription: The restless spirits of clergy who once inhabited this now-defiled temple of Aroden remain within the sanctuary and pulpit.

Envenomed Thorns Trap.name: Ловушка с отравленными колючками

items.name: Колючая ветвь
items.description:
Триггер: Прикосновение к растяжке

Эффект: Отравленные колючки ловушки атакуют существо или объект, касающиеся растяжки.

Envenomed Thorns Trap.Hdescription: A trip wire strung 4 feet above the ground releases a branch studded with envenomed thorns.

Evora Yarket.name: Evora Yarket
Evora Yarket.allSaves: successful Fortitude saves are critical successes instead

Explosive Furniture Trap.name: Explosive Furniture Trap
Explosive Furniture Trap.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:34|name:Identify and Cut Wiring|traits:action:disable-a-device] (expert) to identify and harmlessly cut the taut wiring

items.name: Unsprung Wires
items.description:
Триггер: A creature moves within 5 feet of the pile of broken furniture

Эффект: The pile of furniture and entangling wires explodes outward. The trap deals @Damage[(6d10+27)[slashing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic] save). On a failed save, the target takes a –10-foot penalty to all its Speeds for 1 round (1 minute on a critical failure).

Explosive Furniture Trap.Hdescription: Wiring keeping the furniture together unravels, causing the spring-loaded pieces of furniture and wire to shoot outward.

Faceless Butcher.name: Faceless Butcher
Faceless Butcher.description: The deformed flesh on this humanoid horror's head bears grim holes where their eyes, nose, mouth, and ears should be, and little else. Stories of faceless butchers always center on the monstrous murderer's preferred weapon: a wicked and bloodstained meat cleaver, which the butcher uses to carve flesh from skull to add to their collection of stolen faces. Once they've taken a victim's face, the faceless butcher can wear it, transform into an exact replica of the deceased, and begin stalking their next victim.
Faceless Butcher.language: One Regional Language, Can't Speak Any Language

items.name: Suppressed Alignment
items.description: When using their Change Shape ability, the faceless butcher loses their alignment aura and thus cannot be detected by spells such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.QnTtGCAvdWRU4spv].

items.name: Устрашающее присутствие
items.description:
10 feet. @Check[will|dc:26|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened]

This aura is suppressed if the faceless butcher is using Change Shape.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

items.name: Изменение формы
items.description: The faceless butcher can take on the exact form of any Small, Medium, or Large humanoid whose face they carry in their bag of faces, changing their shape and physical features to precisely match that of the victim whose face they wear. This doesn't change the butcher's Speed or attack or damage bonuses with their Strikes.

items.name: Remove Face
items.description:
Требования: The faceless butcher is within reach of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf] creature

Эффект: The faceless butcher attempts a cleaver Strike or an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the creature's Fortitude DC. On a success, the faceless butcher deals damage as if they had made a successful cleaver Strike against the creature and removes the creature's face. On a critical success, the damage doubles and the creature takes @Damage[4d6[bleed]]. Once its face is removed, the creature takes a permanent -4 status penalty to Charisma checks and Charisma-based skill checks. This penalty can be removed only if the victim recovers its face from the faceless butcher and has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnaLVgxZ9ryUFmUr] spell cast on it.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.NLjzI7gt6djXSoXc]

items.name: Sudden Slices
items.description:
Требования: The faceless butcher is undetected by their target

Эффект: The faceless butcher Strides once and makes two cleaver Strikes against the target. During the Stride, they gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to their Speed.

Flea Swarm.name: Flea Swarm
Flea Swarm.description:
Flea swarms roil across city streets and rural hinterlands in a hissing, scraping scrabble, draining blood from any creatures unfortunate enough to cross their path.

Fleas are little more than a nuisance in most circumstances, but can be lethal when they grow to monstrous proportions or gather in enormous swarms.

items.name: Flea Fever
items.description:
Drain from flea fever can't be reduced or recovered from naturally until the disease is cured.

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Стадия 1: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} ([[/r 1d4]]{1d4 hours})

Стадия 2: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Истощён 1} и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошнота 1} (1 день)

Стадия 3: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and sickened 1 (1 day)

Стадия 4: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3} and sickened 1 (1 day)

Стадия 5: смерть

items.name: Сосать кровь
items.description:
Требования: The flea swarm's last action was Swarming Bites, and it dealt damage to at least one enemy

Эффект: The flea swarm drinks the creatures' blood. Each victim becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and the swarm regains @Damage[3[healing]] HP for each victim drained.

items.name: Роящиеся укусы
items.description: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[(2d4+7)[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage and must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] save. A creature that fails its save is exposed to flea fever.

Gahlepod.name: Gahlepod
Gahlepod.description:
The youngest brughadatches resemble overlarge tadpoles about 2 feet long.

Brughadatches are malevolent fey tricksters with distinct stages of life: they spawn from the First World's primal energies as esurient tadpoles, grow into humanoids capable of creating enticing illusions, then finally evolve into huge, slothful toads that warp their environs with mere thoughts.

Ghost Crystal Cloud.name: Ghost Crystal Cloud
Ghost Crystal Cloud.descriptionHazard: The xulgath corpse splits open to release a cloud of tiny ectoplasmic crystals which, when they are inhaled, disorient and devitalize living creatures.
Ghost Crystal Cloud.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:26|name:Render the cloud inert|traits:hazard,environmental] or @Check[occultism|dc:26|name:Render the cloud inert|traits:hazard,environmental] (expert) to render the crystal cloud inert
Ghost Crystal Cloud.reset: The crystals regrow into a number sufficient to form another dangerous cloud after 1 week.

Giant Aukashungi.name: Giant Aukashungi
Giant Aukashungi.description:
The strongest individual in an aukashungi swarm eventually grows to monstrous proportions.

These massive isopods are native to the Abyssal realm of Gluttondark, in the acidic oceans of the realm's many cavern-worlds. Aukashungis are sometimes summoned to the Material Plane by Zevgavizeb-worshipping cultists, who favor aukashungis for their mindless obedience and sheer destructive potential.

Giant Flea.name: Giant Flea
Giant Flea.description:
Giant fleas are commonly found in areas containing hardy megafauna, such as dinosaurs or mammoths.

Fleas are little more than a nuisance in most circumstances, but can be lethal when they grow to monstrous proportions or gather in enormous swarms.

items.name: Healer's Tools (Expanded)
items.description: This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to Administer First Aid, Treat Disease, Treat Poison, or Treat Wounds. Expanded healer's tools provide a +1 item bonus to such checks. When you carry the tools from place to place, you keep many of the components handy on your person, in pockets or bandoliers.

items.name: Bolts coated with shadow essence
items.description: Короче традиционных стрел, но похожи по конструкции, болты являются амуницией для арбалетов.

items.name: Лишить преимущества
items.description: Ginjana isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf], or flanking creatures of 11th level or lower, or by creatures of 11th level or lower using surprise attack.

items.name: Уклонение
items.description: When Ginjana rolls a success on a Reflex save, she gets a critical success instead.

items.name: Шаг в сторону
items.description:
Триггер: An attack roll to Strike Ginjana fails or critically fails

Эффект: Ginjana redirects the attack to a creature of her choice that is adjacent to her and within reach of the triggering attack. The attacker rerolls the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{Strike's} attack roll against the new target.

items.name: Уязвим к солнечному свету
items.description: Ginjana takes @Damage[20[untyped]] damage for every hour she's exposed to sunlight.

items.name: Hampering Blow
items.description: When Ginjana critically succeeds at an attack roll, the target of the attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] until the end of Ginjana's next turn.

items.name: Лёгкий шаг
items.description: When Ginjana @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Strides} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}, she ignores difficult terrain.

items.name: Подвижность
items.description: Ginjana's movement doesn't trigger reactions when she @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Strides} to move half her Speed or less.

items.name: Теневой экстракт
items.description:
Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:29]

Макс.продолжительность: 6 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[3d6[void],2d6[poison]] (1 раунд)

Стадия 2: @Damage[3d6[void],2d6[poison]] и @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Ослаблен 1} (1 раунд)

Стадия 3: @Damage[3d6[void]] damage; @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage; and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: Ginjana deals an extra 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

items.name: Неожиданная атака
items.description: On the first round of combat, if Ginjana rolls Deception or Stealth for initiative, creatures that haven't acted are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to her.

Gluttondark Babau.name: Gluttondark Babau
Gluttondark Babau.description:
Бабау — ассасин, убийца и садист, что, конечно, не является чем-то необычным, но их склонность к скрытности и неожиданности отличает их от своих сородичей. Бабау формируются из смертных душ убийц-одиночек — тех, кто получал удовольствие от более личных убийств, и в особенности тех, кто совершал убийства с мрачными подробностями.

Когда грешная смертная душа осуждена и отправлена в Бездну, она может превратиться в смертоносного беса — демона. Демоны являются живыми воплощениями греха, будь то классические грехи, такие как гнев или обжорство, или более "специализированные" пороки, такие как одержимость пытками или акт измены или предательства. Будучи однажды сформированным, его движущие цели двояки: накопление личной силы и развращение смертных душ, чтобы они запятнались грехом. Таким образом демоны обеспечивают нескончаемый приток новых демонов для пополнения своих постоянно растущих рядов в Бездне.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Уязвимость к милосердию
items.description: Babaus revel in the gore of a well-timed attack, and when brutal wounds are restored, they recoil in pain. When a creature heals from damage that the babau dealt on their last turn with Grievous Strike, sneak attack, or a critical hit, the demon takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage. The babau can take this mental damage only once per round.

items.name: Ответная слизь
items.description:
Триггер: Существо в досягаемости бабау успешно попадает по нему "Ударом"

Эффект: The babau excretes a gout of acidic, bloodlike slime against the attacker and its weapon. The attacker must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:26|traits:damaging-effect] save.

Критический успех: The attacker avoids the reactive slime.

Успех: Атакующий получает @Damage[1d6[acid]].

Провал: Атакующий получает @Damage[2d6[acid]].

items.description: The babau makes an attack with the intent of creating a particularly horrific and gory wound. It make a melee Strike. This counts as two attacks when calculating their multiple attack penalty. If this Strike hits, the babau deals an additional 1d6 damage and the creature struck is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} for 1 round; this @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18] condition cannot be removed by retching.

items.description: A babau deals an additional 1d6 precision damage precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] creatures.

Guardian of the Faithful.name: Guardian of the Faithful
Guardian of the Faithful.description:
As with any humanoid animated statues of Medium size, giant animated statues are used to guard locations of importance, but their increased size and power make them most useful in large vaults, spacious chambers, or outdoor locations. Animated objects of this strength and size are ideal for tasks and responsibilities usually performed by golems, and more powerful animated objects are thus all but unheard of.

Получив подобие жизни с помощью ритуалов или другой странной магии, одушевлённые объекты имеют разные формы и служат для самых разных целей. Ниже приведены несколько примеров типичных оживленных объектов. Многие из этих существ служат стражами, удивляя ничего не подозревающих авантюристов, своим внезапным нападением. Другие служат праздным развлечением для чересчур богатых, простыми слугами, созданными для выполнения всякой работы, и тому подобного.

Guthallath Rockslide.name: Guthallath Rockslide
Guthallath Rockslide.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:48|name:Buttress the Rocks|traits:environmental] (legendary) to buttress the collapsing rocks in three different locations. Using large and durable materials (or applicable spells) to support the rocks reduces the check to @Check[crafting|dc:45|name:Buttress the Rocks|traits:environmental] (master).
Guthallath Rockslide.reset: The guthallath can reset the hazard with a few days of work stacking the fallen rocks.
Guthallath Rockslide.routine:
(2 actions) On the hazard's first action, any areas of crumbling rocks from a previous round collapse, making a falling rocks Strike against each creature in the area.

On its second action, the hazard crumbles rocks in a 20- foot radius around the previous collapse. A character can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} (DC 40) to determine where the rocks will fall on the following round, but on a critical failure, they incorrectly identify where the rocks will fall.
Guthallath Rockslide.stealth: (master) to notice the odd aging of the stones, seemingly far older and more weathered than the surrounding rocks
Guthallath Rockslide.hp: Hardness 10 in the guthallath's erosion aura
Guthallath Rockslide.Hdescription: The rock walls nearby begin to crumble and collapse.

Hallowed Wheel.name: Hallowed Wheel
Hallowed Wheel.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:31|name:Flip the switch|traits:hazard,complex,magical,mechanical,trap] (master) on the wheel to flip the switch returning it to a harmless carnival game, @Check[thievery|dc:26|name:Erase each rune|traits:hazard,complex,magical,mechanical,trap] (expert) to erase each rune, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (5th level; counteract DC 28) to counteract each rune.
Hallowed Wheel.reset: The trap deactivates and resets if 1 minute passes without any creature moving within range of its sensor.
Hallowed Wheel.routine:
(2 actions) On its initiative, the trap uses its first action to spin, then stops. Roll [[/r 1d8]]{1d8} to determine which segment is topmost when the wheel stops spinning. The wheel uses its second action to replicate the spell listed for that segment (5th level, DC 27, spell attack roll +17). This spell's target is centered on or otherwise includes the nearest creature in the spell's area. This increases the spell's range to 30 feet if necessary. Any spell cast by this trap is occult.

Hallowed Wheel.Hdescription: An ornate wheel, divided into eight segments with a rune painted on each, is mounted on a pole and controlled by a lever that can be triggered manually or a sensor that detects creatures within 30 feet in front of it.

Harrow Doll.name: Harrow Doll
Harrow Doll.description: Harrow dolls are unique constructs that can make predictions about the future. The more elite circuses and traveling shows frequently feature a harrow doll, and many use the doll's abilities to learn more about locals to better customize shows to their tastes-or to find easy marks for later cons. Upset patrons that try to harm a harrow doll or reclaim their payment quickly learn that the construct is more than capable of defending itself.

items.name: Колода карт харро [Металлическая]
items.description:
Эта колода карт, используемая как азартными игроками, так и прорицателями, выпускается в нескольких разновидностях.

Простые колоды карт харро изготавливаются из бумаги низкого качества и обычно имеют лишь значок и цифру, обозначающие масть и расклад. Подобные колоды обычно используются для азартных игр, поскольку фактическое изображение и значение карт не имеют смысла в таких играх. Важны лишь масть и число на карте.

items.name: Uncanny Divination
items.description:
A harrow doll can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X] as part of a harrow reading, which takes the usual 10 minutes.

When casting @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LQzlKbYjZSMFQawP], the harrow doll doesn't need to have previously observed a specific object to learn its direction, but instead can detail the direction only vaguely, using such phrases as "beside a weeping mound" or "beneath the lost sky."

When the harrow doll casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC], there is no effect if the target critically succeeds its save.

Each time a harrow doll makes a harrow reading, it also changes which saving throw is affected by its fortune's favor ability.

items.name: Благосклонность фортуны
items.description:
Whenever the harrow doll attempts a specific type of saving throw, it rolls twice and takes the higher result. The type of saving throw is determined by the suit that featured most prominently in the doll's most recent harrow reading: Fortitude (Hammers or Shields), Reflex (Keys or Books), or Will (Stars or Crowns). If the suit of its latest harrow reading is unknown, roll [[/r 1d6]]{1d6} at the beginning of combat to randomly determine it.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.yQd2Yoht8libCMCv]

items.name: Harrowing Misfortune
items.description:
A creature struck by one of the harrow doll's cards must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save or be cursed with misfortune, which forces the creature to roll twice and take the lower result on its next roll of a specific type, determined by the card's suit (roll [[/r 1d6]]{1d6} to randomly determine the suit). A creature can be cursed with only one effect from harrowing misfortune at a time, with a new curse overriding any previous curse. The curse ends after 1 minute or after the specified roll is made, whichever comes first. The suits and their effects are: Hammers (melee attack roll), Keys (Reflex save), Shields (Fortitude save), Books (skill check), Stars (Will save), and Crowns (spell attack roll).

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.7PYhxmQxCD5kzMlw]

Headless Xulgath.name: Headless Xulgath
Headless Xulgath.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.description: The headless xulgath can sense nearby motion through vibrations and air movement

On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, and on a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for as long as it is sickened. While within the aura, the creature takes a -2 circumstance penalty to saves to recover from the sickened condition. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune to all xulgaths' stenches for 1 minute.

items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Требования: The headless xulgath has a creature grabbed

Эффект: The headless xulgath slams the creature against a nearby surface. The creature takes @Damage[(6d6+6)[bludgeoning]] damage and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:30|traits:damaging-effect] save.

Критический успех: Существо больше не @Condition[Grabbed]{схвачена}.

Критический провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено} на 1 раунд.

items.name: Яростные когти
items.description: The headless xulgath makes up to four claws Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks all count toward the headless xulgath's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after the headless xulgath makes all its attacks.

Herecite of Zevgavizeb.name: Herecite of Zevgavizeb
Herecite of Zevgavizeb.description:
Secreted away in the dark corners of unnamed libraries, necromancer's dens, and heretical scriptoriums, obscure texts describe a horrifying ritual that combines sacrifice and suffering to create a powerful undead being known as a herecite. These monsters, stripped of personal will or desire, are born into the service of an evil god whom they worship unerringly and untiringly, often in spite of any opposing religious leanings they may have had in life. Every herecite harbors an unquenchable self-hatred because it was defiled by such a foul resurrection-a rage it turns outward in an attempt to rob others of their faith and lives.

Herecites often outlast the cults that create them. Stranded herecites are drawn to others of their kind, even if they are dedicated to different evil deities, and when brought together they perform rites to magically bind themselves in a group known as a cabal. While cabal members share enhanced magic and defenses, induction into a cabal appears to hold even deeper significance for herecites. The presence of others of their kind with whom they can pray-in verses warped to venerate wicked gods-seems the only solace these tormented beings can find in undeath. Such a fellowship of sorrow is nigh unbreakable, as many an overzealous crusader has discovered far too late.

Customarily found within heavily modified temples to the pantheon of gods they collectively worship, herecites act in service to their creators or as protectors of unholy ground. High priests of different evil gods may even trade herecites among themselves, allowing their minions to form cabals strengthened by their varied faiths. A lone herecite cut off from its creators-often because it is the sole remnant of a destroyed temple or its master has perished-may wander far and wide in search of a cabal to join. Other times, the herecite seeks out a place sacred to the deity it worshipped in life. Whether motivated by a desire for contrition or vengeance, the end result of this baleful pilgrimage is always the desecration of the holy site and the slaughter of its congregants, who may in turn rise as lesser forms of undead.

Hollow Hush.name: Hollow Hush
Hollow Hush.language: Can't Speak Any Language, Telepathy 100 feet

items.name: Эмоциональный фокус
items.description: Hollow Hush can cast the following cleric domain spells as 9th-rank occult innate spells at will without spending Focus Points: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dj44lViYKvOJ8a53], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jJphHQlENHFlSElH], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J8pL8yTshga8QOk8].

items.name: Эмоциональное неистовство
items.description: Hollow Hush casts up to three spells chosen from its at-will innate spells and its emotional focus spells.

items.name: Питаться эмоциями
items.description:
Частота: Раз в раунд

Эффект: Hollow Hush feeds on the emotional unrest of a single creature within 30 feet that's currently affected by an emotion effect. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:41|traits:damaging-effect] save or take @Damage[5d10[mental]] damage and be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix] for 1 round. If the target fails its saving throw, Hollow Hush regains the same number of Hit Points and Feed on Emotion does not cost Hollow Hush an action, allowing it to use another action this turn.

items.name: Быстрые удары
items.description: Hollow Hush attempts three claw Strikes, each against a different target within reach. The multiple attack penalty applies to each attack, but increases only after all the attacks have been made.

items.name: Спираль отчаяния
items.description:
Триггер: A creature fails a saving throw to resist one of Hollow Hush's innate spells or emotional focus spells

Эффект: As Hollow Hush invades the triggering creature's mind and plants the seeds of negative emotions, it also strips away the target's feelings of hope or positivity. Hollow Hush can immediately end a single emotion effect from which the triggering creature is benefiting.

items.name: Быстро поймать
items.description: The hooklimb always critically succeeds at checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY].

items.name: Сильная вонь
items.description:
30 футов.

Существо, входящее в эманацию, должно совершить спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:28|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened,inflicts:slowed]{Стойкости}. При провале существо испытывает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Тошноту 2}, и при критическом провале оно также @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлено 1} пока испытывает @Condition[Sickened]{тошноту}. Находясь в этой ауре, существо получает штраф обстоятельства −2 к спасброскам восстановления от этой @Condition[Sickened]{тошноты}. Существо, успешно совершившее свой спасбросок, временно иммунно к "Вони" зулгатов на 1 минуту.

items.name: Raking Claws
items.description: The hooklimb flexes hooklike barbs on its claws. Until the start of the hooklimb's next turn, its claws Strikes deal an additional 1d10 persistent bleed damage.

items.name: Раздирать
items.description:
Strike: Коготь

items.name: Не сбежать
items.description:
Триггер: A foe within Horba's reach attempts to move away from her

Эффект: Horba keeps pace with the triggering foe. Horba Strides up to her Speed, following that foe and keeping it in reach throughout its movement until it stops moving or Horba has moved their full Speed.

items.name: Демоническая сила
items.description: Horba deals an extra 1d8 damage with her tridents, and any trident gains the fatal d10 trait while she is using it (both the extra weapon damage die and the fatal trait have already been included in the trident Strike).

items.name: Tainted Rage
items.description:
Horba begins to rage and gains 5 temporary Hit Points. The rage lasts for 1 minute or until she falls unconscious, whichever happens first. While raging, Horba deals 2 additional damage with melee weapons, has a -1 penalty to AC, and cannot use actions that have the concentrate trait unless those actions also have the rage trait. Horba can still @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ] while raging.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feat-effects.Item.z3uyCMBddrPK5umr]

Host of Spirits.name: Host of Spirits

Host of Spirits.reset: The haunt ends 1 round after no creatures are within 50 feet of the house. The haunt resets after 1 day.
Host of Spirits.routine: t For each of its actions, the trap attempts a ghostly hand Strike against a different creature within 50 feet of the ruins of the house (if there are fewer than 3 creatures, the haunt doesn't use its remaining actions).
Host of Spirits.Hdescription: A host of angry spirits inhabiting the ruined house attempts to drag living creatures closer and crush them to death.

Iffdahsil.name: Iffdahsil
Iffdahsil.description: The slithering horror known as Iffdahsil is an undead shoggoth that has haunted the vault of the Black Desert for millennia. Drow legends in particular tend to feature Iffdahsil, terrifying the elves from a young age.
Iffdahsil.allSaves: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам против магических эффектов

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам против магических эффектов
Aura of Annihilation
items.description:
60 feet. @Check[fortitude|dc:45|options:area-effect,inflicts:doomed,inflicts:drained]

A creature entering or starting its turn in the aura that fails at a Fortitude save becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. If the target was already doomed or drained, the values of these conditions increase by 1, to a maximum of doomed 3 and drained 3. A creature that dies while doomed 3 and drained 3 in this way disintegrates into black sand.

items.name: Неубиваемый
items.description: Unlike most undead, Iffdahsil isn't destroyed at 0 HP. Iffdahsil's fast healing continues to function normally, though on any round it begins its turn at 0 HP, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the start of its next turn. While Iffdahsil is at 0 HP, it can be killed permanently only by simultaneously exposing it to direct sunlight (or a 10th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.a3aQxCpoj1q1NQxC] spell) and casting a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.YfJTXyVGzLhM6V8U] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu] spell (or similar magic) directed at destroying it.

items.name: Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(3d10+17)[piercing]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:41|basic]{Стойкости}

Заметка: Paizo не предоставило КС этого умения. Указанный здесь КС — средний КС для уровня существа (в соответствии с таблицами создания существ руководства игрового мастера).

items.description: A creature that begins its turn inside Iffdahsil takes @Damage[10d6[void]] damage. Iffdahsil gains temporary HP for 1 minute equal to half the damage dealt.

@Check[reflex|dc:43], @Damage[10d6[void]], [[/act escape dc=43]], Разрыв 45

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]
